g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'Body Mass (g)' for a linear scale with values from 2,500 to 6,500
Y-axis titled 'density' for a linear scale with values from 0.0000 to 0.0011
Symbol legend titled 'Species' for fill color and stroke color with 3 values: Adelie, Chinstrap, Gentoo
Title text 'Density Mark: Area and Line Overlay'
g.text: Density Mark: Area and Line Overlay
